
::: {.d-block .d-lg-none}
# emLab SOP
:::

::: {.lead}
The emLab Standard Operating Procedures explain the shared conventions that keep our research reproducible, well organized, and easy to collaborate on.
:::

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Files](01-files/index.qmd)

Where things live and how they're organized.

- [Google Shared Drive](01-files/google-shared-drive.qmd)
- [GRIT Data Storage Space](01-files/grit-data-storage-space.qmd)
- [GitHub Structure](01-files/github-structure.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Data](02-data/index.qmd)

Naming, formats, metadata, and confidentiality.

- [Data File Naming](02-data/data-file-naming.qmd)
- [Metadata](02-data/metadata.qmd)
- [Accessing emLab Data in R](02-data/accessing-emlab-data-in-r.qmd)
- [Tidy Data](02-data/tidy-data.qmd)
- [Data Formats](02-data/data-formats.qmd)
- [Data Use Agreements and Confidential Data](02-data/data-use-agreements-and-confidential-data.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Code](03-code/index.qmd)

Style, documentation, and reproducibility.

- [Code Styling](03-code/code-styling.qmd)
- [Code Documentation](03-code/code-documentation.qmd)
- [Functional Programming](03-code/functional-programming.qmd)
- [Exploratory Data Analysis](03-code/eda.qmd)
- [Package Reproducibility](03-code/package-reproducibility.qmd)
- [Pipeline Reproducibility](03-code/pipeline-reproducibility.qmd)
- [Code Review](03-code/code-review.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Quarto](04-quarto/index.qmd)

Authoring reproducible documents and websites.

- [Chunk Best Practices](04-quarto/chunk-best-practices.qmd)
- [Figures, Tables, and References](04-quarto/figures-tables-references.qmd)
- [Citations and Bibliography](04-quarto/citations-and-bibliography.qmd)
- [Caching](04-quarto/caching.qmd)
- [Using R targets](04-quarto/targets-integration.qmd)
- [Publishing](04-quarto/publishing.qmd)
- [Presentations](04-quarto/presentations.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Servers](05-hpc/index.qmd)

Running jobs on Sequoia and Quebracho.

- [Resources and Software](05-hpc/resources-and-software.qmd)
- [Getting Set Up](05-hpc/getting-set-up.qmd)
- [Using Sequoia](05-hpc/using-sequoia.qmd)
- [Using Quebracho](05-hpc/using-quebracho.qmd)
- [Best Practices](05-hpc/best-practices-and-resource-allocation.qmd)
- [Accessing Data](05-hpc/accessing-data.qmd)
- [Accessing Code](05-hpc/accessing-code.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Publications](06-publications/index.qmd)

Authorship, reports, and sharing outputs.

- [Affiliation and Authorship](06-publications/affiliation-and-authorship.qmd)
- [Reports](06-publications/reports.qmd)
- [Publishing Data](06-publications/publishing-data.qmd)
- [Public GitHub Repository](06-publications/public-github-repository.qmd)
- [Sharing on Website](06-publications/sharing-on-website.qmd)
:::

::::
